verses.text: The people are called to give thanks, sing, glory in His name, and 'remember his marvellous works.' Praise feeds on memory. Recalling what God has done keeps the heart thankful and seeking.
The people are called to give thanks, sing, glory in His name, and 'remember his marvellous works.' Praise feeds on memory. Recalling what God has done keeps the heart thankful and seeking.

The people are called to give thanks, sing, glory in His name, and 'remember his marvellous works.' Praise feeds on memory. Recalling what God has done keeps the heart thankful and seeking.
He remembers His covenant for ever, 'the word which he commanded to a thousand generations.' His promise is unchanging. The faithfulness of God spans the ages, sure to every generation of His people.
He remembers His covenant for ever, 'the word which he commanded to a thousand generations.' His promise is unchanging. The faithfulness of God spans the ages, sure to every generation of His people.
He remembers His covenant for ever, 'the word which he commanded to a thousand generations.' His promise is unchanging. The faithfulness of God spans the ages, sure to every generation of His people.
He made covenant with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, pledging 'the land of Canaan' as their inheritance. The promise was personal and firm. God binds Himself by name to bless His chosen.
He made covenant with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, pledging 'the land of Canaan' as their inheritance. The promise was personal and firm. God binds Himself by name to bless His chosen.
He made covenant with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, pledging 'the land of Canaan' as their inheritance. The promise was personal and firm. God binds Himself by name to bless His chosen.
When they were few and wandering, He let no one harm them, saying, 'Touch not mine anointed.' He shielded the helpless. God guards His people most carefully when they are weakest.
When they were few and wandering, He let no one harm them, saying, 'Touch not mine anointed.' He shielded the helpless. God guards His people most carefully when they are weakest.

He called a famine, but first sent Joseph ahead, sold as a slave and tried by God's word. Providence ran before the need. God's hidden hand prepared deliverance long before the trouble came.
He called a famine, but first sent Joseph ahead, sold as a slave and tried by God's word. Providence ran before the need. God's hidden hand prepared deliverance long before the trouble came.
He called a famine, but first sent Joseph ahead, sold as a slave and tried by God's word. Providence ran before the need. God's hidden hand prepared deliverance long before the trouble came.
He called a famine, but first sent Joseph ahead, sold as a slave and tried by God's word. Providence ran before the need. God's hidden hand prepared deliverance long before the trouble came.
The king freed Joseph and made him lord of his house and ruler over his princes. The prisoner was exalted. God lifts the lowly to high place in His own time.
The king freed Joseph and made him lord of his house and ruler over his princes. The prisoner was exalted. God lifts the lowly to high place in His own time.
The king freed Joseph and made him lord of his house and ruler over his princes. The prisoner was exalted. God lifts the lowly to high place in His own time.
Israel came to Egypt and multiplied, until God turned the Egyptians' hearts to hate them. Even hostility served His plan. God can use the enmity of men to ripen His purposes.
Israel came to Egypt and multiplied, until God turned the Egyptians' hearts to hate them. Even hostility served His plan. God can use the enmity of men to ripen His purposes.
Israel came to Egypt and multiplied, until God turned the Egyptians' hearts to hate them. Even hostility served His plan. God can use the enmity of men to ripen His purposes.
He sent Moses and Aaron, who showed His signs among the people. Deliverers were raised up. When the hour comes, God provides the servants His work requires.
He sent Moses and Aaron, who showed His signs among the people. Deliverers were raised up. When the hour comes, God provides the servants His work requires.
He sent darkness, turned the waters to blood, and brought frogs and swarms of flies through the land. The plagues fell at His word. The God of Israel proved His power over Egypt's gods.
He sent darkness, turned the waters to blood, and brought frogs and swarms of flies through the land. The plagues fell at His word. The God of Israel proved His power over Egypt's gods.
He sent darkness, turned the waters to blood, and brought frogs and swarms of flies through the land. The plagues fell at His word. The God of Israel proved His power over Egypt's gods.
He sent darkness, turned the waters to blood, and brought frogs and swarms of flies through the land. The plagues fell at His word. The God of Israel proved His power over Egypt's gods.

He gave them hail and lightning, locusts that devoured every herb, and at last smote all the firstborn, the chief of their strength. Judgment mounted to its height. The God who pleads long will strike at last.

He gave them hail and lightning, locusts that devoured every herb, and at last smote all the firstborn, the chief of their strength. Judgment mounted to its height. The God who pleads long will strike at last.

He brought His people out laden with silver and gold, none feeble among them, while Egypt was glad to see them go. They left enriched and whole. God's redeemed depart from bondage as conquerors, not beggars.

He brought His people out laden with silver and gold, none feeble among them, while Egypt was glad to see them go. They left enriched and whole. God's redeemed depart from bondage as conquerors, not beggars.

He spread a cloud for covering and fire for light, gave quails and bread from heaven, and opened the rock so waters gushed in the desert. His care was constant. The God who freed them also fed and led them every step.

He spread a cloud for covering and fire for light, gave quails and bread from heaven, and opened the rock so waters gushed in the desert. His care was constant. The God who freed them also fed and led them every step.

He spread a cloud for covering and fire for light, gave quails and bread from heaven, and opened the rock so waters gushed in the desert. His care was constant. The God who freed them also fed and led them every step.

He remembered His holy promise to Abraham and brought His people out with joy, that they might keep His statutes. The end of redemption is obedience. God saves His people that they may live to honour Him.
